nodes.text: Who knew cutting dead plants could work up such an appetite? [narration] He lets out an exacerbated sigh as he picks up his backpack [/narration].
The sky is tired. We should head back before it gets too dangerous out here. [narration] He looks around, and then looks at you, confused. [/narration]. Where did you leave your backpack?

Ha! And I thought I was delirious. Well, we don't want you returning to Virelios without any haul, so let's try to find it.

Hit the [color=#FFA74E] Explore [/color] button on the top right of your screen to navigate around this area. I'm sure it will come up sooner rather than later.
